meaning: American Society of Testing Materials,美国材料实验协会 [军] American Society for Testing Materials,美中试验材料协会
examples: An American Society for Testing and Materials (ASTM) label.
ASTM A194 nuts of corresponding material are recommended.
Nuts may be of the same material or may be of compatible grade of ASTM A194.
Is there an equivalent Book of Standards anywhere in the IT industry that could fix the specs like that of an ASTM A325 nut?
Since previous standards had not addressed commercial zip lines in great detail, an ASTM International subcommittee is working on developing a new standard for these kinds of rides.
